CustomField.formula: IF(TEXT(NATT_BluEdge_Price_Type__c)= "Major Component" , TEXT(NATT_Unit__c) &"-"& SBQQ__ProductCode__c, IF(TEXT(NATT_BluEdge_Price_Type__c)= "Optional Coverage", TEXT(NATT_Unit__c) &"-"& SBQQ__ProductCode__c, IF(TEXT(NATT_BluEdge_Price_Type__c)= "Extended Basic", TEXT(NATT_Unit__c) &"-"& SBQQ__ProductCode__c, NULL)))
CustomField.label: Unit-Tavant Id2
